command:
sudo bash -c 'cat > /etc/systemd/system/claude-poller.service << EOF
[Unit]
Description=Claude GitHub Bridge Poller
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=jose
ExecStart=/bin/bash /home/jose/claude-poller.sh
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
systemctl daemon-reload && systemctl enable claude-poller && systemctl start claude-poller && systemctl status claude-poller --no-pager | head -5'
